Semantic thinness (hollow-significance): Catch lines that assert importance, sticking power, or consequence without naming a concrete referent or result. Matched template: the {thinModifier} {summaryNoun} {linkingVerb} {weakJudgment}.

Negation reframe found: "Burnout is not just about long hours. It is a stress condition that develops when job demands keep outpacing the emotional, cognitive, and physical resources needed to meet them.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.

Negation reframe found: "The answer is not heroic endurance. It is redesign: clearer priorities, healthier limits, meaningful rest, and work that does not require a person to spend themselves entirely just to stay employed.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.

Negation reframe found: "That does not mean every child who watches fast-paced videos will develop attention problems. It means repeated exposure to very stimulating media can become one factor in a broader attention environment.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.

Negation reframe found: "Parents do not need panic. They need a realistic framework: better content, stronger routines, fewer autoplay traps, more sleep, more play, and more moments where a child learns that life does not have to flash, ding, and swipe every ten seconds to be interesting.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.

Negation reframe found: "The bigger risk is not that a child watched a show after school. It is that highly stimulating, poorly bounded screen use becomes the default environment, replacing the slower experiences that help attention grow.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.

Negation reframe found: "Good communicators are not couples who never misstep. They are couples who know how to recover.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.

Negation reframe found: "The solution is not magical phrasing. Negation reframe found: "Adult loneliness is not only the absence of people. It is often the absence of people who know you without explanation.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.

Negation reframe found: "Most failed habits are not evidence that a person is lazy. They are evidence that behavior change is harder and more mechanical than self-help culture likes to admit.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.
